hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP operations teams translate compliance policies into automated rules that streamline reviews, route cases, preserve evidence, and maintain audit-ready decision logs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Policy execution depends on manual interpretation
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to translate written policies into consistent operational rules across fragmented provider outputs. This slows decision-making, creates gaps in review workflows, and weakens auditability for digital asset compliance processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes provider outputs, applies internal policies as configurable rules, routes reviews, opens cases and preserves decision logs to create one auditable compliance workflow for operational teams.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY applies internal policies to provider outputs then routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence within a structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual reviews. Structured compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented provider outputs into operational workflows with decision logs, cases and evidence to enforce policies consistently across digital asset compliance processes.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in translating compliance policies into governed workflows with audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for secure bank due diligence and provider orchestration.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help apply compliance policies to workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY routes reviews based on policy rules
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how decisions and evidence are logged for audits
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect to automated case creation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs, applies internal policies, manages cases and supports decision logging for structured compliance workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY translates compliance policies into rules that route reviews, open cases, apply approvals and record decisions across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and related evidence, supporting audit-ready records are maintained for compliance reviews and investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs into a connected compliance operating layer without replacing underlying tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs to create structured workflows, audit evidence and reporting across digital asset compliance functions.
final_title: Turn compliance policies into controlled workflows
final_description: See how SFTY structures VASP policy execution through rules, case routing, evidence preservation and audit-ready decision logs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
